title: (BUG) activitypub.rs PostRow missing context_url in profile_page and post_page queries
description:
PostRow (activitypub.rs:479-485) has 4 fields: id, content_html, context_url, created_at. Two queries select only 3 columns (missing context_url):

1. profile_page (line 330): SELECT id, content_html, created_at — sqlx::FromRow will error at runtime because context_url column is absent. The error is silently swallowed by .unwrap_or_default() on line 335, so the profile page renders with zero posts.

2. post_page (line 413): SELECT p.id, p.content_html, p.created_at — same FromRow error, but here it propagates as a 500 Internal Server Error.

Fix: either add context_url to both SELECTs, or add #[sqlx(default)] to the context_url field so sqlx defaults it to None when the column is absent.
